mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS cart_id, c.quantity, c.create_time, p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.price, COALESCE(p.image_url, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(p.images, '$[0]'))) AS image_url, p.images, p.user_id AS seller_id, p.status AS product_status, (p.price * c.quantity) AS subtotal FROM cart c INNER JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
